getPage.description: Navigate to a specific page on the site and extract its content. Provide a targetUrl, or let the handler derive it from other params.

targetUrl.description: Full URL to navigate to. Optional if the handler can resolve the URL from other context.

searchContent.description: Search or filter content on the site (products, articles, users, etc.).

extractData.description: Extract specific data from the currently loaded page — text, attributes, or structured content.

selector.description: CSS selector for the element(s) to extract. If omitted, extracts default content.

type.description: What to extract: 'text', 'html', 'attribute', or leave empty for handler default.

attribute.description: Attribute name to extract when type is 'attribute'.

fillForm.description: Fill and optionally submit a form on the current page.

fields.description: Key-value pairs of form fields to fill: { '#email': 'user@example.com', '#name': 'John' }

submitOnComplete.description: Whether to submit the form after filling (default: false)

submitSelector.description: CSS selector for the submit button. Defaults to 'button[type=submit]'.

returns.submitted: Boolean: whether the form was submitted
returns.fieldsFilled: Number of fields that were filled
